_description: Opt-in, profile-gated hook template for the Tidy AI harness. Inactive by default. Copy to an activated config and set enabled true plus a profile only when intentionally opting in. Hooks must never edit repo docs or source, never commit, and may write only to gitignored local memory introduced in 1.5.1.

sessionStart.note: Placeholder. Script is introduced opt-in in 1.5.1; absent by default.

postToolUse.note: Placeholder. Writes only to gitignored local memory when activated.

stop.note: Placeholder. Proposes a checkpoint; never edits repo docs or source.
